betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Linear Accelerator (LINAC)§f

§aYour entry-level multiblock particle accelerator.§f

The §bLinear Accelerator Controller§f is the central block of the QMD Linear Accelerator — a straight-line particle accelerator that produces early particle beams (protons, deuterons, boron ions) for use in higher-tier QMD multiblocks.

§6Recipe Ingredients§f:
§b•§f §bElite Plating§f (nuclearcraft)
§b•§f §bExtreme Alloy Ingot§f (nuclearcraft)
§b•§f §bBasic Processor§f (qmd)
§b•§f §bAccelerator Casing§f (qmd)

§6Key Component Materials (depth-2)§f:
§b•§f §bTough Alloy Ingot§f / §bHard Carbon Alloy Ingot§f
§b•§f §bCrystal Binder§f
§b•§f §bBoron Ingot§f (hbm or nuclearcraft)
§b•§f §bDU Plating§f
§b•§f §bAccelerator Glass§f
§b•§f §bStainless Steel Ingot§f (qmd)
§b•§f §bSteel Chassis§f
§b•§f §bN-Type Doped Silicon§f
§b•§f §bRedstone§f / §bGold Ingot§f / §bSilver Ingot§f

§6Source Code Reference§f:
§b•§f QMDConfig: §eaccelerator_linear_min_size = 6§f (default), §eaccelerator_linear_max_size = 100§f (default), configurable range §e6–255§f
